steps: Go to https://dashboard.nexmo.com/sign-up and create a free account (or log in at https://dashboard.nexmo.com)
After logging in, navigate to the top of your Dashboard — your API Key and API Secret are displayed directly there
Alternatively, go to https://dashboard.nexmo.com/settings to find your credentials
Copy the API Key and API Secret
To generate a JWT Bearer token for newer APIs, go to https://dashboard.nexmo.com/applications and create a Vonage Application, then download the private key

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Vonage API key (shown on the dashboard homepage and Settings page)

notes: Free trial credits provided on sign-up — no credit card required initially
The API Key is not secret but the API Secret must be kept private
Newer APIs (Messages, Voice) require a JWT generated from an Application private key, not just the API key/secret
Vonage was formerly known as Nexmo — the dashboard URL remains dashboard.nexmo.com

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account balance to verify credentials
